items.title: Conte makes subtle dig at Amorim over Højlund
items.summary: Napoli head coach Antonio Conte has appeared to aim a dig at former Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim.

items.title: Brighton v Bournemouth: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Updates on the 8pm (GMT) kick-off at the Amex ⚽ Live scores | Top scorers | Read Football Daily The beautiful game Three changes for Brighton from their last Premier League game, a 1-1 draw at Manchester City. Joel Veltman, Brajan Gruda and Danny Welbeck come in for Maxcim De Cuyper, Yasin Ayari and Georginio Rutter. Gruda and Welbeck starred in the FA Cup victory at Old Trafford eight days ago. Continue reading...

items.title: Aangever Kökcü houdt Besiktas in race om Europees voetbal
items.summary: Orkun Kökcü heeft maandagavond een hoofdrol vertolkt bij een moeizame overwinning van Besiktas. In de Süper Lig werd laagvlieger Kayserispor pas diep in blessuretijd over de knie gelegd.

items.title: Het WK, Virgil en Trump: 'Wat zal dan het KNVB-standpunt zijn?'
items.summary: Columnist Nico Dijkshoorn zit in zijn maag met het WK van komende zomer.

items.title: Grim geeft klein deel van strijdplan Ajax voor CL-clash in Spanje bloot
items.summary: Ajax treft dinsdag met Villarreal een ploeg die sterk is in de omschakeling en dat betekent wat voor het strijdplan dat de Amsterdammers hebben voor het bezoek aan het Estadio de la Cerámica. Fred Grim verklapte dat zijn ploeg niet van plan is om hoog druk te gaan zetten.

items.title: Monaco's Balogun: Playing Real Madrid 'a dream'
items.summary: United States men's national team and Monaco striker Folarin Balogun told ESPN he will achieve one of his dreams on Tuesday when the Ligue 1 club face Real Madrid at the Bernabéu in the Champions League.

items.title: City confirm $26.8M Guehi signing from Palace
items.summary: Manchester City have announced the signing of England centre-back Marc Guéhi from Crystal Palace on a five-and-a-half-year deal.

items.title: Why clamor for Man United, Tottenham 'DNA' makes no sense
items.summary: Fans of Man United and Spurs expect a certain style of play, but it's nothing to do with DNA. Nobody complains when their team is winning.

items.title: Why Premier League clubs keep signing each other's players for the same fee
items.summary: Premier League clubs are doing business with each other at an unusually higher rate this season.

items.title: ‘I am at the best club in England’: Guéhi seals £20m move to Manchester City
items.summary: England defender’s contract was due to expire in summer City are without injured Dias, Gvardiol and Stones Marc Guéhi completed a £20m move to Manchester City from Crystal Palace on Monday, with Pep Guardiola describing him as a high-class defender who is the “perfect age” and will provide an immediate boost owing to injuries. The 25-year-old England international signed a five and a-half year contract worth about £300,000 a week after an agreement was reached on Friday. Continue reading...

items.title: London City sign six-time Champions League winner Delphine Cascarino
items.summary: France winger left San Diego Wave by mutual agreement Daniëlle van de Donk delights in London City debut London City Lionesses have signed the France winger Delphine Cascarino on a three-and-a-half year deal, the Women’s Super League newcomers continuing their eye-catching recruitment drive by acquiring another highly rated international. The 28-year-old won six Champions League titles with OL Lyonnes. Her most recent club was the NWSL side San Diego Wave, with whom she parted ways on Sunday by mutual agreement, having wanted to move back closer to home. Continue reading...

items.title: Marokko dringt top tien van de wereld binnen en zit Oranje op de hielen
items.summary: Het bereiken van de Afrika Cup-finale heeft Marokko geen windeieren gelegd wat de FIFA-wereldranglijst betreft. De verliezend finalist klimt drie plekken en is nu de nummer acht van de wereld.

items.title: Jonathans op zoek naar zelfvertrouwen: 'Het kan nog steeds lukken in Utrecht'
items.summary: Miliano Jonathans (21) stond bij Vitesse te boek als een groot talent en maakte een mooie transfer naar FC Utrecht, maar daar kwam hij nog niet bijzonder veel aan spelen toe. De aanvaller heeft met een verhuur aan Excelsior nu bewust een stapje teruggezet.

items.title: Under-pressure Frank 'feeling trust' of Spurs board
items.summary: Tottenham head coach Thomas Frank says lunch with board members is an "extremely good sign" despite pressure mounting on him during an underwhelming season.

items.title: ‘The dream will have to wait’: Moroccan media reacts to Afcon final heartache
items.summary: Walid Regragui faced calls to resign despite stunning record with Atlas Lions after nightmare that prolongs 50-year wait “There will be no second star for Morocco,” read the headline of Le360.ma, referring to the symbol of an Africa Cup of Nations title being sewn on the shirt of the winning team. “The most prestigious African title is at odds with Morocco. The dream and the ambition will have to wait some time,” laments the writer, Abdelkader El-Aine. It is now 50 years since Morocco won their only Afcon. This month, as hosts of the tournament, Morocco had started to dream of a second title. That became a nightmare on Sunday evening in Rabat. Continue reading...

items.title: Which managers might be free in the summer?
items.summary: A summer of managerial change could be on the cards with a World Cup, contracts expiring, and clubs already hunting for new bosses.

items.title: Frank feels 'trust' from Spurs board after meeting with decision-makers
items.summary: Thomas Frank insists he feels the support of the Tottenham board despite mounting pressure on his job as head coach.

items.title: McKenna: 'Hard to be consistent' in incredibly close Championship
items.summary: A slow-ish start to the season held back a squad many considered to be the best in the Championship, but the improvement at Ipswich Town has been ominous in recent weeks.

items.title: A miracle could not save them - but an NFL giant is back
items.summary: Cigar-crowned Mike Ditka outfits. A snow-glittered Soldier Field. A Caleb Williams miracle. Chicago Bears bedlam. Chicago Bears heartbreak. It was emotion-strangling NFL playoff football at its quintessential box office best.

items.title: Djokovic's Australian Open century sends message in bid for 25th Grand Slam
items.summary: Novak Djokovic notched his 100th Australian Open win in his 2026 tournament opener on Monday, but reaching a quarter century of Grand Slam titles remains the number of more interest to him.
